entries.text:
Verses 1-6

CHAPTER

12 Israel’s Salvation Hymn

1. When Israel will sing (Isaiah 12:1) 2. What Israel will sing (Isaiah 12:2-3) 3. To whom Israel will sing (Isaiah 12:4-5) 4. The Holy One in the midst (Isaiah 12:6)It is Israel’s future song of praise for salvation. Read in this light what a wonderful meaning this little chapter has. The song will be sung by the delivered and blessed remnant “in that day.” In what day? When the Lord arises to judge; when He is manifested in His glory; when He brings back the captivity of His people.
